vision.visual_reason: Outdoor sidewalk cafe table with latte and iced drink in foreground, sunlit urban sidewalk with pedestrians, trees, and storefronts visible beyond.

vision.visual_reason: Clear view of a warm, cozy cafe interior featuring a decorative tiled bar with espresso equipment, exposed brick walls, mounted taxidermy, framed artwork, and leather seating stools.

Bright, airy interior of a café with abundant hanging greenery, white floral garlands, rustic wooden tables, a service counter, menu boards, and tiled flooring, conveying a lush garden-inspired atmosphere.

Interior view of a bar/coffee shop featuring a stocked glass-door refrigerator with bottled drinks, abundant greenery and white roses cascading from above, a branded tote bag, and warm wooden accents creating an inviting, lush atmosphere.
Interior view of a coffee bar counter with a large floral arrangement, stacked paper cups, an espresso machine, and wood paneling creating a warm, sophisticated café atmosphere.

Well-lit interior showing a wooden coffee bar counter with espresso machine, menu board, display case with pastries, plants, and decorative shelving. Person behind counter is partially visible but not the focus. Warm wood tones and natural light create a cozy cafe atmosphere.
